summary: Completed comprehensive mobile and desktop testing of all three dashboards (Family, Caregiver, Agency) with Google Gemini-inspired UI redesign. All dashboards display correctly on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports with proper responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally blocks tab clicks on mobile
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work around the issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800)
Family Dashboard displays correctly on mobile with proper responsive layout
Family Dashboard displays correctly on desktop with max-w-2xl container
Family Dashboard tab switching works: Home, Vitals, Chat, Schedule
Caregiver Dashboard displays correctly on mobile with proper responsive layout
Caregiver Dashboard displays correctly on desktop with max-w-2xl container
Caregiver Dashboard tab switching works: Tasks, Vitals, AI, Notes
Enterprise Dashboard displays correctly on mobile with proper responsive layout
Enterprise Dashboard displays correctly on desktop with max-w-4xl container
Enterprise Dashboard tab switching works: Home, Staff, Clients, Billing, EVV
Back button functionality works on all dashboards
Bottom navigation pills work correctly on all dashboards
Google Gemini-inspired design elements present: gradient backgrounds, rounded cards (rounded-2xl/3xl)
Safe-area support implemented for mobile devices
Message input works on Family Dashboard (desktop)
Task checkbox interaction works on Caregiver Dashboard (desktop)
Notes input works on Caregiver Dashboard (desktop)
Staff search input works on Enterprise Dashboard (desktop)
Responsive containers: Family/Caregiver use max-w-2xl, Enterprise uses max-w-4xl
Clean UI with proper spacing, typography, and color schemes
Navigation flow: Landing page → Dashboard selection → Dashboard tabs → Back to landing
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (minor overlay issue on mobile, all core functionality works)
